reviews.comment:
Estacion de Servicio Oficial del ACA. es muy cómoda porque esta en pleno centro, pero al mismo tiempo es lo mas problemático porque en horarios pico la cola de autos interrumpen el trafico. los empleados son atentos, pero lentiiisimos para atender. atienden de a un cliente por vez, y el resto que espere. en otras estaciones de servicio cada empleado atiende a dos o tres autos al mismo tiempos. creo que deben mejorar la rapidez con que atienden.!!!

(Translated by Google)
This official ACA service station is very convenient because it's right downtown, but at the same time, that's the biggest problem because during peak hours the line of cars blocks traffic. The employees are attentive, but incredibly slow. They only serve one customer at a time, and everyone else has to wait. At other service stations, each employee serves two or three cars simultaneously. I think they need to improve their service speed!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15539995661554460615/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBZ2ZfMGN3EAE
